summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features: Report User, Auto-Release Timer (48 hours), and Share Page protection message. All 12 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/reports - creates report with valid data (returns report_id, status Pending)
✅ POST /api/reports - returns 400 when trying to report yourself
✅ POST /api/reports - returns 404 for non-existent reported user
✅ GET /api/reports - admin can list all reports
✅ GET /api/admin/pending-auto-releases - admin can view pending auto-releases
✅ GET /api/share/{code} - endpoint accessible and returns transaction preview
✅ Payment confirmation requires seller confirmation first (400 error)
✅ Report User button appears on other users' profiles
✅ ReportUserModal opens with correct form fields (reason dropdown, description)
✅ Report submission via UI succeeds with success toast
✅ Share Transaction page shows 'This transaction is protected by TrustTrade escrow.'
✅ Transaction Detail shows 'Auto-Release Timer Active' when payment is made
✅ Auto-release timestamp displayed correctly on Transaction Detail page
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features fully tested: 1) Report User system - POST/GET /api/reports endpoints work correctly, ReportUserModal with data-testid selectors (report-reason-select, report-description, submit-report-btn), Report User button on UserProfile with data-testid=report-user-btn. 2) Auto-Release Timer - 48-hour timer set on payment confirmation (auto_release_at field), displayed on TransactionDetail page when payment_status='Paid', admin endpoints /api/admin/process-auto-releases and /api/admin/pending-auto-releases work. 3) ShareTransaction page shows protection message.

mocked_apis.note: Email sending is MOCKED via mock_send_email function

report_user_api.model: UserReport with fields: report_id, reporter_user_id, reported_user_id, reason, description, transaction_id, status, admin_notes, created_at

auto_release_timer.ui_display: Auto-Release Timer Active section shown on TransactionDetail when payment_status='Paid'

share_page_protection_message.message: This transaction is protected by TrustTrade escrow.
